title: Simply Create & Chill
description: Simply Create & Chill is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly modpack built around the Create mod, with added food, decor, worldgen, and QOL upgrades for immersive solo or multiplayer play.
body:
** Still under developement**

**Simply Create & Chill is a lightweight but content-rich modpack centered around the ingenuity of the Create mod, expanded with thoughtful additions to make your world feel more alive, immersive, and fun. This isn’t a bloated tech pack or a fantasy overhaul – it’s a carefully curated experience that retains the feel of vanilla Minecraft, while giving builders, engineers, and adventurers the tools they’ve always wished for. From lush biomes and delicious food to mechanical marvels and visual polish, this pack empowers you to build better, play deeper, and explore further – solo or with friends.**

## ⚡Performance
Simply Create & Chill runs great, even on modest setups. With Sodium, FerriteCore, and other optimization tools, performance stays smooth and stable. You can build big contraptions or play with friends without worrying about lag or crashes.

## ⚙️Gameplay
The Create mod is the star, letting you build complex machines and beautiful structures. It’s supported by food, farming, decoration, and utility mods that expand your options without overwhelming the vanilla experience.

## 🏔️World Generation
The world feels handcrafted thanks to subtle worldgen enhancements. Rolling hills, natural forests, and immersive terrain create the perfect backdrop for exploration and building – without cluttering the map.

## 📶Multiplayer
Play with friends effortlessly. Voice chat, map sharing, and land protection make multiplayer smooth and intuitive. Build, automate, or explore together with zero hassle.

## ✨Visuals and Polish
Visual mods like Continuity, Clean Swing, and shader support bring subtle polish without changing Minecraft’s core style. The game looks sharper, cleaner, and more immersive – just the way it should.

## 🔮Philosophy
This pack expands Minecraft without replacing it. Every mod was chosen to enhance creativity and charm, not bury it under complexity. If you love Create and want a balanced, beautiful world – this is for you.
